hero.title: PRECISION. POWER. PERFORMANCE.
hero.subtitle: The CRÉNOT smart scale. Engineered for athletes. 14 advanced body metrics in one sleek, monolithic glass design.

philosophy.quote: YOUR BODY IS AN ENGINE. MEASURE IT LIKE ONE.
philosophy.author: - CRÉNOT SPORTS

metrics.title: 14 CORE METRICS
metrics.desc: Go beyond weight. Analyze your entire body composition with clinical-grade accuracy.

tech.title: DUAL-FREQUENCY BIA SENSOR
tech.desc: Utilizing high and low frequencies to penetrate cell membranes, delivering absolute precision in tracking muscle hypertrophy and fat loss.

app.title: SEAMLESS SYNC
app.desc: Bluetooth 5.0 connects instantly to the CRÉNOT Health App. Syncs with Apple Health & Google Fit. Visualize your progress.

s2.name: Crenot Gofit S2 Smart Body Scale
s2.desc: The Gofit S2 smart scale is an essential device for your family's health. Featuring a minimalist, elegant Euro-Japanese design, Gofit S2 makes it easy to track detailed health metrics via smartphone.

x6.name: Crenot Gofit X6 Pro Smart Body Scale
x6.desc: Crenot Gofit X6 Pro is an upgraded smart scale with an ultra-large color display, allowing you to track 8 metrics directly on the scale. Standout design with a bold Orange tone.

i8.name: Crenot Inbody i8 8-Point Measurement Scale
i8.desc: Inbody i8 is a home measurement technology revolution. With 8 contact points and PureBIA® technology, i8 analyzes each body segment (Arms, Legs, Torso) with gym-standard accuracy.

x3.name: Crenot Graci X3 Personal Hair Removal Machine
x3.desc: Experience a home spa with the Crenot Graci X3 hair removal machine using IPL technology and deep surface cooling.
